payload.answer: Conflict detected: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. Durable memory should not be updated until the conflict is resolved.

entity_resolution.reason: The name 'Sara' matches an existing person reference, but the new relationship ('niece') directly conflicts with the existing relationship ('daughter'). This could be a correction or a different Sara; do not merge or overwrite without clarification.

details: Processed a direct contradiction between existing and new family-relationship claims.
Existing fact not overwritten due to unresolved conflict.

repair_options: Ask whether this is the same Sara or a different person with the same name.
Ask which relationship is correct and whether the old memory should be replaced.
If intended as a correction, require explicit overwrite confirmation before updating durable memory.
